'''lahate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jus|jus]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-h-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jus|jus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lahate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:lahate|lahate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lahatesher|lahatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lahatesherĂ«m|lahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lahatero|lahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lahateshĂ«|lahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lahateshĂ«m|lahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilahatero|gokilahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilahateshĂ«|gokilahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilahateshĂ«m|gokilahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golahankerom|golahankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golahankeshĂ«|golahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golahankeshĂ«m|golahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golahankeya|golahankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lahaterom|lahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lahatemu|lahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lahateya|lahateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilahaterom|gokilahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilahatemu|gokilahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilahateya|gokilahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:lahahate|lahahate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lahahatesher|lahahatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lahahatesherĂ«m|lahahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lahahatero|lahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lahahateshĂ«|lahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lahahateshĂ«m|lahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilahahatero|gokilahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilahahateshĂ«|gokilahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilahahateshĂ«m|gokilahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golahahankerom|golahahankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golahahankeshĂ«|golahahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golahahankeshĂ«m|golahahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golahahankeya|golahahankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lahahaterom|lahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lahahatemu|lahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lahahateya|lahahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilahahaterom|gokilahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilahahatemu|gokilahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilahahateya|gokilahahateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:lĂŠhĂŠte|lĂŠhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lĂŠhĂŠtesher|lĂŠhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m|lĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠhĂŠtero|lĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|lĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|lĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠhĂŠtero|gokilĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gokilĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokilĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golĂŠhĂŠnkerom|golĂŠhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«|golĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|golĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golĂŠhĂŠnkeya|golĂŠhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠhĂŠterom|lĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠhĂŠtemu|lĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lĂŠhĂŠteya|lĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠhĂŠterom|gokilĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠhĂŠtemu|gokilĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilĂŠhĂŠteya|gokilĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:lafhafte|lafhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lafhaftesher|lafhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafhaftesherĂ«m|lafhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafhaftero|lafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lafhafteshĂ«|lafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafhafteshĂ«m|lafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafhaftero|gokilafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilafhafteshĂ«|gokilafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafhafteshĂ«m|gokilafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golafhafnkerom|golafhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golafhafnkeshĂ«|golafhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golafhafnkeshĂ«m|golafhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golafhafnkeya|golafhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafhafterom|lafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafhaftemu|lafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lafhafteya|lafhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafhafterom|gokilafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafhaftemu|gokilafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilafhafteya|gokilafhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
